estimation.accidentDeclaredDesc: Declared major incidents can impact suggested range.
estimation.actionableResultDesc: Use the range and confidence to position your listing realistically.
estimation.autonexTipDesc: A realistic starting price increases qualified contacts.
estimation.bodyStyleAutoHint: Body style suggested automatically for this model. You can change it if needed.
estimation.bodyStyleChoiceHint: This model exists in multiple body styles. Select the one that matches your vehicle.
estimation.catalogLoadingDesc: We are preparing makes and models for reliable input.
estimation.catalogUnavailableDesc: We could not load vehicle references. Check your connection, then try reloading the catalog.
estimation.conditionHistoryDesc: Accurate condition and maintenance history lead to more credible valuation.
estimation.confidenceLevelDesc: An immediate read of estimate strength.
estimation.convertReadyDesc: Once value is generated, publish immediately with a recommended price.
estimation.errorMileageRange: Mileage must be between 0 and 1,500,000 km.
estimation.errorYearRange: Year must be between 1950 and current year.
estimation.fairerEstimateDesc: These details improve estimate relevance for your vehicle profile.
estimation.higherPrecisionDesc: Condition and usage context reduce uncertainty.
estimation.howItWorksDesc: Describe your vehicle, specify condition, then receive a structured valuation report in seconds.
estimation.inputTipDesc: Clear and complete data improves estimate reliability.
estimation.landingLead: In a few steps, get a clear and credible valuation you can use before publishing.
estimation.marketRangeDesc: A reliable base to decide your price positioning.
estimation.noModelFound: No model found for this make
estimation.partialDataHint: Some fields are optional, but more detail improves estimate quality.
estimation.practicalTipDesc: Include usage and maintenance context for better valuation confidence.
estimation.quickJourneyDesc: Complete the steps and get a practical market valuation quickly.
estimation.readyAfterDesc: You can directly continue to publish with a recommended price.
estimation.readyNextDesc: After valuation, publish your vehicle with a recommended price.
estimation.recommendedPriceDesc: Ready to use to publish quickly on AutoNex.
estimation.reliableTransparentDesc: The tool combines reference profiles and market signals. Each estimate includes range and confidence.
estimation.title: Valuation
estimation.usageAdviceText: Pick the closest usage profile for better consistency.
estimation.usageFrameText: These details help frame valuation relative to actual use.
estimation.vehicleIdentityLead: Provide key vehicle information to build a reliable and actionable estimate base.

report.claimMessageStrong: Valuation primarily backed by solid AutoNex market comparables.
report.claimMessageLimited: Market-guided valuation with an additional layer of caution.
report.claimMessageReference: Indicative valuation backed by references and a partial market signal.
report.claimMessageExploratory: Indicative valuation in a context of still-insufficient market data.
report.supportCautionModerate: The market signal supports the valuation, but a margin of caution remains advisable.
report.supportCautionWeak: The market signal stays partial: use this report as a decision marker, not as strong proof.
report.comparableSelectionHint: Comparables selected by model/year/mileage proximity, listing quality and price coherence.
report.exactScoreDeemphasized: The exact score is intentionally de-emphasized to stay consistent with the available evidence level.
report.positioningHint: Recommended positioning to publish on AutoNex.
report.indicativeDataLimited: Available data is more limited; the range is intentionally wider.
report.comparablesSummary: {{used}} comparables retained, including {{strong}} solid ones, with a median similarity of {{similarity}} / 100.
report.noOvercoteFactors: No major upside factors detected yet.
report.noDecoteFactors: No significant downside factors noted at this stage.
report.noEvidenceNote: No additional evidence notes for this case.
report.compareAria: View more similar listings on AutoNex

toneRobust.confidenceInterpretation: The comparison base is solid; you can steer your price with a controlled negotiation margin.
toneRobust.actionHeadline: Publish now with a confident positioning
toneRobust.actionDescription: The report supports a fast publication decision with a credible price ceiling.
toneRobust.comparablesIntro: Coherent comparables close to your vehicle profile to support a convincing market entry price.
toneRobust.comparablesEmptyMessage: The evidence base remains robust, even if the comparables on display here are partial.
toneRobust.ctaFootnote: AutoNex tip: a price aligned with this robust range encourages qualified contacts.

toneQualified.confidenceInterpretation: The market signal is workable, with reasonable caution on final positioning.
toneQualified.actionDescription: The report gives a serious base, to adjust according to your time and margin priorities.
toneQualified.comparablesIntro: Useful comparables to frame the price, with a qualified evidence level and a margin of interpretation.
toneQualified.comparablesEmptyMessage: Exact comparables are still few. The report still helps frame your decision with caution.
toneQualified.ctaFootnote: AutoNex tip: in qualified mode, stay close to the range and adjust to market feedback pace.

toneIndicative.confidenceInterpretation: The result remains useful as an initial marker, but requires careful reading before deciding.
toneIndicative.actionHeadline: Publish carefully or refine the data first
toneIndicative.actionDescription: The report is indicative: prefer a cautious approach and verify your assumptions before publishing.
toneIndicative.comparablesIntro: Partial comparables: use them as framing markers, without over-reading the market signal.
toneIndicative.comparablesEmptyMessage: The report mainly relies on reference signals. Keep a cautious pricing strategy.
toneIndicative.ctaFootnote: AutoNex tip: in indicative mode, prefer a cautious positioning and re-evaluate after first feedback.

toneCautious.confidenceInterpretation: The result remains useful as an initial marker, but requires careful reading before deciding.
toneCautious.actionHeadline: Publish carefully or refine the data first
toneCautious.actionDescription: The report is indicative: prefer a cautious approach and verify your assumptions before publishing.
toneCautious.comparablesIntro: Comparables still limited: use them as markers, not as strong proof.
toneCautious.comparablesEmptyMessage: The report mainly relies on reference signals. Keep a cautious pricing strategy.
toneCautious.ctaFootnote: AutoNex tip: in a low-evidence context, prefer a cautious strategy before locking the price.

errors.nameMin2: Name must be at least 2 characters

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.subtitle: GDPR data export and permanent account deletion.
dangerZone.pendingDescription: Use the “Cancel deletion” button in the banner above to undo before the scheduled deletion date.
dangerZone.exportDescription: Download a complete copy of all data we hold on you, in JSON format. Compliant with GDPR Article 20 (right to portability).
dangerZone.deleteDescription: This action will request the permanent deletion of your AutoNex account. A 30-day grace period lets you change your mind. After that, your personal data will be irreversibly anonymised under GDPR. Your active listings will be removed immediately.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.comingSoonDesc: Email and WhatsApp preferences (new features, listing replies, moderation alerts).

deleteDialog.intro: Before you confirm, here's what happens:
deleteDialog.bullet1: Your account will be deactivated immediately.
deleteDialog.bullet2: Your active listings will be removed from the site.
deleteDialog.bullet3: Your data is kept for 30 days; the request can still be cancelled during that period.
deleteDialog.legalNote: In line with our legal obligations, certain accounting data (transactions, invoices) will be retained in anonymised form.
deleteDialog.confirmHelpPrefix: This action becomes irreversible after 30 days. To confirm, type
deleteDialog.requestFailed: The deletion request failed. Please try again.

deletionBanner.anonymizedDescription: This account has been anonymised. No action is possible.
deletionBanner.pendingTitleWithDate: Your account will be deleted on {{date}}
deletionBanner.pendingTitleWithoutDate: Your account is scheduled for deletion
deletionBanner.pendingDescription: You can cancel this request at any time before that date. Your active listings have been removed from the platform.

deletion.scheduledWithEmailWarning: Account scheduled for deletion on {{date}}. The confirmation email could not be sent.
deletion.cancelled: Deletion cancelled. Your account remains active.

preferences.heading: Notification preferences

cookies.preferencesDescription: Choose which cookie categories you want to allow. You can change your choices at any time via the "Manage my cookies" button in the footer.
cookies.technicalDescription: Required for the site to work, cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDescription: Help us understand site usage to improve it (Google Analytics, anonymised).
cookies.monitoringDescription: Help us detect technical bugs, anonymised. Will become opt-out in user settings later.

welcome.title: Welcome to AutoNex!

welcome.bodyRemaining: You have {{remaining}} free credits left (out of {{received}} received). That's {{listings}} free listings. Expire in {{days}} days.

credits.pageIntro: Buy a credit pack to post your listings and activate boosts. Credits are non-refundable and expire 12 months after purchase.

errors.rateLimitExceeded: You have submitted too many messages recently. Please wait an hour before retrying.

mentions.pageDescription: Legal notice for the AutoNex platform, operated by APLi SARLU — publisher, hosts, intellectual property, liability.

editor.title: 1. Site publisher

editor.brand: Site operated under the trade name "AutoNex"

publisher.title: 2. Publication director

hosting.title: 3. Hosts

ip.item3: Any unauthorised reproduction, distribution or exploitation of protected content is strictly prohibited and may result in legal action.

responsibility.title: 5. Liability for listing content
responsibility.item1: AutoNex acts as a technical intermediary.
responsibility.item2: Listings are published under the sole responsibility of their authors (individuals or dealers).
responsibility.item3: AutoNex cannot be held liable for the accuracy, completeness or legality of information posted by users.
responsibility.item4: An a-priori moderation system (for individuals) and community reporting are in place to maintain the platform's quality.

links.title: 6. Hyperlinks
links.item1: Outbound links to third-party sites are provided for information purposes only.
links.item2: AutoNex has no control over the content of those sites and disclaims all liability for it.
links.item3: Inbound links to autonex.mg are allowed provided they do not create confusion about the origin or nature of the content.

credits.title: 7. Credits
credits.item1: Listing photos and visuals: provided by users who have certified that they hold the required rights.
credits.item2: Icons and UI components: shadcn/ui, lucide-react (open-source licences).

law.title: 8. Applicable law and jurisdiction
law.item1: This legal notice is governed by Malagasy law.
law.item2: Any dispute regarding the interpretation or performance of this notice falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tribunal de Première Instance of Antananarivo, subject to mandatory procedural rules.

cookies.pageDescription: Cookies used by AutoNex: technical, Google Analytics 4 analytics, functional, Sentry monitoring. Consent management.
cookies.heading: Cookies

what.title: What is a cookie?
what.body: A cookie is a small text file placed on the user's device (computer, smartphone, tablet) by the browser when visiting a website. Cookies make it possible to recognise the device, store preferences, analyse usage, or provide personalised services.

technical.title: 1. Technical cookies (mandatory, no consent required)
technical.row2Purpose: Access to the beta version of the platform
technical.note: These cookies are strictly required for the service to function and cannot be disabled without preventing the use of AutoNex.

analytics.title: 2. Analytics cookies (consent required)
analytics.note: These cookies are only set with the user's explicit consent (via the cookie banner).

monitoring.title: 4. Monitoring cookies (legitimate interest, revocable)
monitoring.row1Purpose: Reproduction of technical bugs, no personal identifying data

management.title: Cookie management
management.item1: Consent banner: on your first visit, a banner lets you choose which cookie categories to accept
management.item2: "Manage my cookies" button: in the footer, lets you change your choices at any time
management.item3: Browser settings: you can also configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Warning: blocking technical cookies may prevent AutoNex from working
management.item4: Deferred effect: if you withdraw your consent after a cookie has been set, it will not be set again on subsequent visits, but its already-stored content may persist until natural expiration

dataDeletion.pageDescription: Procedure to delete your account and personal data on AutoNex Madagascar: from the dashboard or by email, legal retention, revoking Google and Facebook sign-ins.
dataDeletion.heading: Deletion of your data
dataDeletion.intro: AutoNex respects your right to have your personal data deleted, in line with the GDPR, Malagasy law No. 2014-038 on personal data protection, and international practice.

what.title: 1. What deletion involves
what.intro: When you request account deletion we carry out the following actions:
what.item1: Deletion of your user profile (last name, first name, phone, email).
what.item2: Deletion of your published listings and their photos.
what.item3: Deletion of your remaining credit balance, which is non-refundable under the <0>Terms</0>.
what.item4: Deletion of your transaction and message history on the front-end.
what.item5: Deletion of Google and Facebook OAuth links.
what.item6: Anonymisation of any reviews and reports you submitted (the content stays, but no identifier points back to you).

kept.title: 2. What may be retained
kept.intro: For legal, tax and accounting reasons, some information may be kept in anonymised form for the period required by Malagasy and European law:
kept.item1: Invoices and payment receipts linked to AutoNex credit purchases: kept for 10 years (accounting obligation).
kept.item2: Anonymised technical logs (partial IP addresses, session metadata): 12 months, for service security and fraud prevention.
kept.item3: Technical transaction identifiers held by our payment provider, retained in line with applicable banking regulations.

dashboard.title: 3.1. From your dashboard (recommended)
dashboard.body: Sign in to your account → Settings menu → "Danger zone" section → Delete my account. You will receive a confirmation email at the address linked to your account. Deletion becomes effective within 7 days of confirmation.

email.title: 3.2. By email
email.body: Send an email to <0>info@autonex.mg</0> from the address linked to your AutoNex account, with the subject <1>"Account deletion request"</1>. Include your sign-in email and, if possible, your account identifier (visible in Settings > My profile).
email.followup: We handle email requests within 30 days at most (typically within 7 days). You will receive a written confirmation once deletion is effective.

oauth.title: 4. Removing Google or Facebook sign-ins
oauth.intro: If you signed in to AutoNex via Google or Facebook, deleting your AutoNex account automatically revokes the link between your third-party account and our service. You can also revoke that link at any time, independently of deleting your AutoNex account:
oauth.facebook: Facebook: Settings & privacy → Settings → Apps and websites → AutoNex → <0>Remove</0>. Direct link: <1>facebook.com/settings?tab=applications</1>.
oauth.note: This revocation on the Google or Facebook side prevents AutoNex from accessing those data again, but does not delete your existing AutoNex account — for that, follow section 3 above.

delay.title: 5. Timing and confirmation
delay.body: The maximum legal processing time is 30 days from receipt of your request. In practice, AutoNex processes requests within 7 days. You will receive a written confirmation email once deletion is complete.

recourse.title: 6. Recourse
recourse.intro: If you believe your rights are not being respected, you can:
recourse.item1: Contact us at <0>info@autonex.mg</0> to open an internal complaint.
recourse.item2: Refer the matter to the Malagasy Data Protection Authority (CMIL) or, for European users, the CNIL or the data-protection authority of your country of residence.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.body: For any question about data deletion, contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO): PIRBAY Ali As — <0>info@autonex.mg</0>. See also our <1>Privacy policy</1> for the complete list of data collected and their purposes.

privacy.pageDescription: AutoNex privacy policy: data collected, purposes, legal basis, recipients, retention periods, user rights (GDPR + Malagasy law 2014-038).
privacy.heading: Privacy policy

framework.title: Applicable legal framework
framework.item1: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) — applicable to users in the European Union
framework.item2: Loi malgache n°2014-038 of 9 January 2015 on personal data protection

controller.title: 1. Data controller
controller.item1: APLi SARLU (full identifiers in the <0>Legal notice</0>)
controller.item2: Data Protection Officer (DPO): PIRBAY Ali As — <0>info@autonex.mg</0>

data.title: 2. Data collected and purposes
data.row1Data: Last name, first name, email, WhatsApp phone, password (hashed with bcrypt)
data.row1Purpose: Provision of the marketplace service, authentication
data.row2Data: Vehicle photos, description, price, approximate GPS location, technical specifications
data.row3Data: Anonymised transaction IDs, AutoNex credit history, boosted listings status
data.row3Basis: Performance of contract + Legal obligation (accounting retention)
data.row6Data: Error logs, stack traces, user-agent, session ID (via Sentry)
data.row7Data: Reporting reasons, reporter ID, admin decisions
data.row7Basis: Legitimate interest + Legal obligation (audit log retention)

notCollected.title: 3. Data NOT collected
notCollected.intro: AutoNex stores NO sensitive banking data:
notCollected.note: All payment data is processed exclusively by approved third-party payment providers (see "Recipients" section). Only anonymised transaction identifiers and the status (success/failure) are kept.

recipients.title: 4. Data recipients

staff.title: Internal AutoNex staff
staff.item1: Sole manager: PIRBAY Ali As (full access as DPO)
staff.item2: Designated administrators: access to the data strictly required for their duties (moderation, support)

recipients.row1Data: All user, listing and transaction data
recipients.row3Data: Error logs, stack traces, user-agent, anonymised session ID
recipients.row4Data: Truncated IP (anonymisation enabled), aggregated analytics sessions

transfers.title: 5. Transfers outside Madagascar
transfers.intro: Some sub-processors are located outside Madagascar (United States, Singapore), so personal data transfers to those countries may occur. These transfers are governed by:
transfers.item1: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) published by the European Commission (for EU users)
transfers.item2: The contractual terms of the sub-processors, in line with international data-protection standards

retention.title: 6. Retention periods
retention.row2Duration: 3 years after last login, then automatic deletion or anonymisation

rights.title: 7. User rights
rights.intro: In accordance with the GDPR and Malagasy law 2014-038, every user has the following rights:

access.label: Right of access:
access.desc: obtain a copy of the data concerning them

erasure.label: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"):
erasure.desc: request the deletion of their data

portability.label: Right to portability:
portability.desc: receive their data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format

object.label: Right to object:
object.desc: object to processing on legitimate grounds

withdraw.label: Right to withdraw consent:
withdraw.desc: at any time for processing based on consent

automated.label: Right not to be subject to automated decisions:
automated.desc: AutoNex does not currently use any automated processing with legal effect on users

procedure.title: Procedure to exercise these rights
procedure.item1: Email: <0>info@autonex.mg</0> with a copy of a valid ID document
procedure.item2: Response time: 30 days maximum from receipt of the complete request
procedure.item3: Free of charge: except for manifestly unfounded or excessive requests

recourse.title: Recourse
recourse.item1: Malagasy users: CMIL (Commission Malagasy Informatique et Libertés) — cmil.mg (if established at the date of consultation)
recourse.item2: EU users: CNIL (France) — cnil.fr — or the supervisory authority of your country of residence

security.title: 8. Data security
security.intro: AutoNex implements the following technical and organisational measures:
security.item1: TLS 1.3 encryption for all communications (HTTPS mandatory)
security.item3: Row Level Security (RLS) enabled on every Supabase table holding personal data
security.item4: Audit logs for every administrator action
security.item5: Anti-bot rate limiting (max 20 listings per user per 24h)
security.item6: A-priori moderation (individuals) and community reporting with auto-hide

changes.title: 10. Updates
changes.body: This policy may be updated to reflect changes in the platform or legal obligations. The last-updated date is shown in the footer. Users are notified by email of any substantial change.

terms.pageDescription: AutoNex Terms: access, signup, listing publication, credits, reporting, liabilities, termination, mediation. Vehicle marketplace in Madagascar.
terms.heading: Terms and Conditions

preamble.title: Preamble
preamble.body1: These Terms and Conditions (hereafter "Terms") govern access to and use of the AutoNex platform, operated by APLi SARLU, a vehicle marketplace in Madagascar.
preamble.body2: AutoNex is a <0>technical intermediary</0> connecting buyers and sellers of vehicles (individuals and dealers). AutoNex is never a party to transactions concluded between users.

user.label: User:
user.desc: any adult natural person using the AutoNex platform, whether registered or not

listing.label: Listing / Ad:
listing.desc: a publication by a user describing a vehicle offered for sale or rental

individual.label: Individual:
individual.desc: user posting listings on a non-professional basis

dealer.label: Verified dealer:
dealer.desc: professional user who has provided the necessary documents to validate their status (see article 4)

credits.label: AutoNex credits:
credits.desc: unit of value providing access to paid services (premium publishing, boosts)

boost.label: Boost / Featuring:
boost.desc: paid service that increases a listing's visibility

report.label: Report:
report.desc: action by which a user reports a listing they consider problematic

art2.title: Article 2 — Acceptance and updates to the Terms
art2.item1: Using the platform implies full and complete acceptance of these Terms
art2.item2: AutoNex reserves the right to modify the Terms at any time
art2.item3: Substantial changes will be notified by email to registered users, with 15 days' notice
art2.item4: If the user disagrees with the new Terms, they can close their account before the changes take effect
art2.item5: Continued use of the platform after the changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the new Terms

signup.title: 3.1 Signup conditions
signup.item3: Provide accurate, complete and up-to-date information

unique.title: 3.2 Single account
unique.body: A user may create only one account per natural person.

confidentiality.title: 3.3 Credential confidentiality
confidentiality.item1: The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their password and for any activity carried out from their account
confidentiality.item2: Any suspicious activity must be reported immediately to <0>info@autonex.mg</0>

refusal.title: 3.4 Refusal, suspension, deletion
refusal.body: AutoNex reserves the right to refuse a signup, suspend or delete any account in the event of a Terms violation, without notice for serious infringements (fraud, illegal content).

individual.title: 4.1 Individual
individual.item2: Subject to a-priori moderation for each new listing
individual.item3: Subject to moderation of changes on sensitive fields (title, description, price, photos)

dealer.title: 4.2 Verified dealer
dealer.intro: Status granted after AutoNex validates the following documents:
dealer.item4: Proof of business premises (lease, title deed, utility bill)
dealer.item5: Benefits from lighter moderation (real-time publishing and edits)
dealer.item6: Bound by the same content rules as individuals

revoke.title: 4.3 Revocation of dealer status
revoke.body: In case of repeated Terms violations or fraudulent practices, AutoNex may revoke verified dealer status and re-apply a-priori moderation.

allowed.title: 5.1 Allowed content
allowed.item1: Vehicles that may legally be sold in Madagascar
allowed.item2: Vehicles owned by the user or for which the user holds a valid sales mandate
allowed.item3: Vehicles with proper papers (registration card, technical inspection where applicable)

forbidden.title: 5.2 Strictly forbidden content
forbidden.item1: Stolen, undocumented vehicles or those whose origin cannot be justified
forbidden.item2: Fraud, scams or attempts to defraud
forbidden.item3: Discriminatory, offensive, defamatory or illegal content
forbidden.item4: Mentions inviting payments via Western Union, MoneyGram, cryptocurrencies, unsecured international transfers
forbidden.item5: Identity theft or publishing on behalf of a third party without authorisation
forbidden.item7: Personal data of third parties without their consent

veracity.title: 5.3 Truthfulness of information
veracity.item1: The user warrants that the information published is accurate
veracity.item2: Sanctions for false information range from listing removal to account deletion

photoRights.title: 5.4 Photo rights
photoRights.item1: The user warrants that they hold all rights (ownership, reproduction, distribution) over the photos published
photoRights.item2: AutoNex disclaims all liability for third-party claims on photos published by users

limits.title: 5.5 Publication limits
limits.item1: Maximum 20 new listings per user over 24 rolling hours
limits.item2: This limit aims to prevent spam and automated abuse

moderation.title: 5.6 Moderation
moderation.item1: AutoNex reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to refuse, modify or remove any listing that violates these Terms or applicable laws
moderation.item2: No notice is required for content that is manifestly illegal or dangerous
moderation.item3: A motivated rejection message is sent to the user by email

art6.title: Article 6 — AutoNex credits and paid services

mechanic.title: 6.1 How credits work
mechanic.item1: AutoNex credits are an internal unit used to access paid services
mechanic.item2: Prices are shown in the site's "Monetization" section and may change

providers.title: 6.2 Payment providers
providers.item1: Payments are handled by third-party providers approved in Madagascar
providers.item2: AutoNex stores NO sensitive banking data: only anonymised transaction identifiers are kept for traceability
providers.item3: Transactions comply with the relevant security standards (PCI-DSS for bank cards)
providers.item4: The list of payment providers currently used is available on request at <0>info@autonex.mg</0>

payments.title: 6.3 Accepted payment methods
payments.item1: Mobile Money: MVola, Orange Money, Airtel Money
payments.item3: Additional methods may be added in the future

boosts.title: 6.4 Boosts and featuring
boosts.item1: Nature: increased listing visibility (priority placement, badge, homepage pinning)
boosts.item2: Duration: varies by boost type (shown at purchase time)
boosts.item3: Price: shown in AutoNex credits at the time of purchase

refunds.title: 6.5 Refunds
refunds.item1: Unused AutoNex credits: refundable on request within 14 days of purchase, except for credits obtained via promo codes
refunds.item2: Already-spent AutoNex credits: non-refundable except for service failures attributable to AutoNex (e.g. prolonged platform outage, technical activation error)
refunds.item3: Procedure: email info@autonex.mg with justification and payment details

promo.title: 6.6 Promo codes
promo.item1: Each promo code specifies its terms (uniqueness, expiry, amount, applicable category)
promo.item2: Promo codes are not refundable in cash
promo.item3: Promo codes cannot be combined with another promo code unless stated otherwise

invoices.title: 6.7 Invoices
invoices.item1: Invoices are issued on request at <0>info@autonex.mg</0>, within 15 working days
invoices.item2: Invoices comply with Malagasy tax requirements

right.title: 7.1 Right to report
right.item1: Any signed-in user can report a listing published by another user
right.item2: Users cannot report their own listings
right.item3: A user can only report the same listing once

process.title: 7.3 How reports are handled
process.item1: Auto-hide: when a listing reaches 3 pending reports, it is automatically hidden pending admin review
process.item2: Review: the moderation team handles reports as quickly as possible
process.item3: Final decision: confirm (listing rejected) or dismiss (listing reactivated)

abuse.title: 7.4 Reporting abuse
abuse.body: Abusive reports (repeated, unfounded, unfair competition) may lead to sanctions: warning, temporary suspension or even account deletion.

role.title: 8.1 AutoNex's role
role.item1: AutoNex is a technical intermediary, not a seller
role.item2: AutoNex does not enter into any transactions with users
role.sub4: The legal compliance of vehicles sold

users.title: 8.2 User responsibility
users.item2: The legality of the transactions they enter into
users.item3: Any taxes that may be owed (VAT, import duties, professional resale)
users.item4: Compliance with regulations applicable to the relevant vehicles

safety.title: 8.3 Safety recommendations
safety.item1: Arrange meetings in a public place, preferably during the day
safety.item2: Request and verify official documents (registration card, ID) before any payment
safety.item3: Never pay before physically inspecting the vehicle
safety.item5: Have an independent technical inspection done if needed
safety.item6: Be wary of requests for international transfers, foreign mobile money, or cryptocurrencies
safety.item7: Report any suspicious listing via the "Report" button

limit.title: 8.4 Limitation of liability
limit.item1: Within the limits allowed by Malagasy law, AutoNex's liability is capped at the amounts actually received by AutoNex for services provided to the user in the 12 months preceding the damage
limit.item2: Exclusions: indirect damages, lost profits, loss of chance, intangible damages

autonex.title: 9.1 AutoNex property
autonex.item1: AutoNex trademark, logo, design, editorial content and source code are the exclusive property of APLi SARLU

user.title: 9.2 User content
user.item1: Users retain ownership of their content (photos, descriptions, etc.)
user.item2: By publishing content on AutoNex, the user grants APLi SARLU a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free licence for the legal duration of the rights, to use, reproduce, represent, adapt and distribute that content in connection with the AutoNex service and its promotion
user.item3: This licence ends when the user deletes the content, subject to mandatory legal backups

art10.title: Article 10 — Personal data
art10.body: The collection and processing of personal data are governed by the <0>Privacy Policy</0>.

duration.title: 11.1 Duration
duration.body: The Terms apply as long as the user has an active account on the platform.

userExit.title: 11.2 Termination by the user
userExit.item1: The user may delete their account at any time from their personal area (feature being rolled out — meanwhile, request by email at <0>info@autonex.mg</0>)
userExit.item2: Deletion erases active listings and anonymises data retained for legal reasons

platformExit.title: 11.3 Termination by AutoNex
platformExit.item1: For Terms violations: temporary suspension then account deletion, with notice proportional to severity
platformExit.item2: For serious infringements (fraud, illegal content, security breach): immediate deletion without notice
platformExit.item3: The AutoNex credit balance at the time of suspension/deletion is handled on a case-by-case basis depending on the reason for termination

art12.title: Article 12 — Force majeure
art12.body: Neither party can be held liable for failure to perform its obligations in the event of force majeure (natural disaster, war, pandemic, major third-party infrastructure outage, binding administrative decision, etc.). The affected party will notify the other as soon as possible.

mediation.title: 13.1 Prior mediation
mediation.item1: In case of dispute, the parties agree to seek an amicable solution before any legal action

law.title: 13.2 Applicable law
law.body: These Terms are governed by Malagasy law.

jurisdiction.title: 13.3 Competent jurisdiction
jurisdiction.body: Any dispute regarding the interpretation or performance of these Terms falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tribunal de Première Instance of Antananarivo, subject to mandatory applicable procedural rules.

art14.title: Article 14 — Contact
art14.body: For any question about these Terms: <0>info@autonex.mg</0>

errorBoundary.title: Oops, something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: We're sorry for the inconvenience. You can retry or return to the home page.

beta.heading: Restricted access
beta.subtitle: AutoNex is currently in private beta. Enter the access code to continue.
beta.success: Access granted. Welcome to the AutoNex beta.

monetization.creditsVisibilityDesc: Publish and boost your listings with Ariary packs. Manual payment verified by the team.
monetization.suggestionsHint: Suggestions based on city and listing type.

banner.defaultSubtitle: National visibility, city-level targeting, qualified leads — contact us for media.

yas.heroTitle: Buy, sell or value a car in Madagascar

sell.label: Sell my car
sell.helper: Publish your vehicle in a few steps.

moderated.title: Moderated listings
moderated.body: Each listing is reviewed before publication.

estimation.title: Transparent valuation
estimation.body: An argued range with an explicit confidence level.

local.title: 100% Madagascar
local.body: Designed for the Malagasy market: MGA, cities, local dealers.

fast.title: Fast to use
fast.body: Smooth mini-app embedded in YAS & Moi, no app to install.

deals.heading: Top deals
deals.subtitle: Listings with genuinely reduced prices, verified on AutoNex.
deals.empty: No deals right now. Check back later!

cta.title: Not sure yet?
cta.body: Find out what your car is really worth in 2 minutes — no strings attached.
